Culex Larvae Colorimetry

Helle Aronson - Clément Vinauger

2025-11-12

NOTE: This notebook produces the dotplots with boxplots and violin plots for each nutrient type presented in Figure 5 of Gregory et al., Stage-specific divergence in larval thermal tolerance among populations of the Culex pipiens Assemblage. Journal of Medical Entomology, accepted for publication on June 18, 2026.

Execution of the code requires the raw data contained in the files: - “Culex_Protein_July2025.xlsx” - “Culex_Glycogen_July2025.xlsx” - “Culex_Total Lipids_July2025.xlsx” - “Culex_Triglycerides_July2025.xlsx”
